tasks.label: free-port-3000
args: $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force }

tasks.label: parse-deployments
args: const fs=require('fs'); const parser=require('@babel/parser'); const code=fs.readFileSync('src/components/DeploymentsView.tsx','utf8'); try { parser.parse(code,{sourceType:'module',plugins:['typescript','jsx']}); console.log('ok'); } catch (error) { console.log(error.message); console.log(JSON.stringify(error.loc)); }
